subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest over mountain and desert in the path of God! Praised be the Lord that thou art, with utmost joy and rapture and with sincere intent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوه و بیابان در سبیل الهی الحمد لله در نهایت شوق و شعف بنیتی صادقه
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
